falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern assumed contained volatility; sustained VIX spike indicates systemic stress breach, invalidating the pattern match as a stable bottom formation

falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,800 on any single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This breaks the August 2024 swing low structure; the 79% pattern match depends on higher-low preservation, so this voids the bottom thesis entirely

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury spread inverts by >25bps (2Y yield exceeds 10Y by 25bps or more)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The blowoff score of 39 assumes no imminent recession trigger; a deepening inversion signals economic contraction that would override the pattern's risk-on recovery signal

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
